atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Define the theme for Tailwind CSS v4. Use this directive to customize colors, fonts, animations, and other design tokens.

atDirectives.name: @keyframes
atDirectives.description: Define custom keyframe animations that can be used with Tailwind's animate- utility.

atDirectives.name: @import
atDirectives.description: Import other CSS files, including Tailwind's base styles with `@import "tailwindcss"`.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Define custom variants in Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Define custom utilities in Tailwind CSS v4.
